title.purpose: Card titles, table entity names, dialog titles, and sidebar brand text.

body.purpose: Default admin copy, table cells, descriptions, and form help.

label.purpose: Badges, compact metadata, small controls, and table-adjacent labels.

shadows.name: hairline-container-ring
shadows.purpose: Default card and grouped surface boundary.

shadows.name: tiny-lift
shadows.purpose: Small separation for stat cards only.

motion.name: control-state
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, active, sheet, and sidebar state changes.

motion.name: sidebar-width
motion.purpose: Existing sidebar collapse and offcanvas movement.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact Arteesans blue action button for workflow progress.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #1e5896; color: #ffffff; padding: 0 10px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 160ms ease-out, transform 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 160ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #083769; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30, 88, 150, 0.28); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral button for secondary admin actions and filters.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid #eaeaea; border-radius: 8px; background: #f3f4f7; color: #252525; padding: 0 10px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 160ms ease-out, border-color 160ms ease-out, box-shadow 160ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e8f0f9; border-color: #d0d5dd; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30, 88, 150, 0.22); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Compact field for filters, forms, and review workflows.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 240px; min-width: 0; border: 1px solid #d0d5dd; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #252525; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 160ms ease-out, box-shadow 160ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #404a5d; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #8a93a3; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #1e5896; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30, 88, 150, 0.22); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Small pill for real operational status.
components.css: .ds-badge-status { height: 20px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #eaeaea; border-radius: 999px; background: #ffffff; color: #252525; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-status[data-state='approved'] { border-color: #b9edc9; background: #e6f5ec; color: #006b24; } .ds-badge-status[data-state='pending'] { border-color: #ffe0a1; background: #fff7e6; color: #7a5200; } .ds-badge-status[data-state='rejected'] { border-color: #f7bac0; background: #fdeaec; color: #9a1b28; }

components.name: Admin Card
components.description: Flat operational container for stats and grouped content.
components.html:
Open requests

12

Requests waiting for artisan matching
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(30, 88, 150, 0.05), #ffffff); color: #252525; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(37, 37, 37, 0.10); font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-kicker { margin: 0; color: #404a5d; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-value { color: #252525; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.15; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-card-note { margin: 0; border-top: 1px solid #eaeaea; background: rgba(243, 244, 247, 0.5); color: #404a5d; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding-top: 12px; }

components.name: Admin Table
components.description: Primary scan surface for applications and service requests.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; color: #252525; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-table th { height: 40px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eaeaea; padding: 0 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table td { border-bottom: 1px solid #eaeaea; padding: 8px; vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(243, 244, 247, 0.5); } .ds-table strong { display: block; font-weight: 500; } .ds-table span { display: block; color: #404a5d; } .ds-table a { color: #1e5896; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; } .ds-table a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-table .ds-right { text-align: right; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Left-side operational navigation with compact icons and active state.
components.html: AArteesans AdminOverviewRequestsArtisan Applications
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 256px; min-height: 280px; border-right: 1px solid #eaeaea; background: #f8f8f9; color: #252525; padding: 8px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-brand { height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; color: #252525; padding: 0 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-sidebar-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 6px; background: #1e5896; color: #ffffff; font-size: 12px; } .ds-sidebar-link { height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 8px; color: #404a5d; padding: 0 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; } .ds-sidebar-link:hover { background: #f3f4f7; color: #252525; } .ds-sidebar-link[data-active='true'] { background: #e8f0f9; color: #083769; }

narrative.overview:
Arteesans Admin is a restrained operations workstation for the internal team reviewing artisan applications, monitoring service requests, manually matching customers to artisans, and maintaining categories. The visual system should feel precise, scan-friendly, and trustworthy at desk distance under ordinary office lighting. It is an app surface, not a brand campaign.

The current implementation uses a neutral shadcn base with Outfit typography and compact primitives. Future admin work should preserve that density while bringing in the Arteesans mobile brand palette: blue is the primary operational accent, neutrals remain quiet, and semantic colors communicate status rather than decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Compact task density for repeated operational review sessions.
One-family typography with Outfit across headings, labels, body, and data.
Restrained neutral surfaces with Arteesans blue reserved for primary actions, active navigation, and important links.
Tables and cards are functional containers, not decorative set pieces.
State colors exist for approval, warning, and rejection outcomes.

rules.name: The Blue Is Work Rule
rules.body: Blue is not decoration. It means proceed, select, review, navigate, or act.

rules.name: The Neutral Is Not Beige Rule
rules.body: Admin surfaces stay white, cool neutral, or brand-tinted. Do not introduce cream, sand, parchment, tan, or warm paper backgrounds.

rules.name: The Status Means Status Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, and red are reserved for real operational state. Never use them as ornamental palette variety.

rules.name: The One Sans Rule
rules.body: Use Outfit for product UI. Do not introduce display fonts for buttons, labels, tables, or navigation.

rules.name: The Dense But Legible Rule
rules.body: Prefer the existing text-sm and 32-36px control heights for admin workflows, but never reduce muted text below readable contrast.

rules.name: The Flat-First Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit on the page unless interaction or layout requires separation. Reach first for spacing, border, or tonal contrast.

rules.name: The No Ghost Cards Rule
rules.body: Do not combine a 1px border with a soft shadow blur of 16px or more on cards, buttons, alerts, or panels.

dos: Do use Arteesans blue (`brand-blue`) for primary actions, active navigation, key links, and selected operational states.
Do preserve Outfit as the UI typeface across headings, labels, body text, data, buttons, and navigation.
Do keep the dashboard dense enough for operators handling multiple pending items in one session.
Do use real status vocabulary and real data in tables, badges, and dashboard cards.
Do use full borders, rings, tonal fills, and spacing to separate surfaces.
Do keep cards at 12px radius or less unless the component is a badge or icon button that genuinely needs pill geometry.
Do provide hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, error, and empty states for interactive admin components.
donts: Don't build generic SaaS dashboards with cream/sand backgrounds, purple gradients, hero metric cards, or identical icon+heading+text card grids.
Don't use over-rounded UI with 32px+ card radii, glassmorphism, or the ghost-card pattern of a 1px border plus wide soft shadow.
Don't make dense enterprise tables with no visual hierarchy; entity, metadata, status, and action columns need different weight and tone.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section.
Don't present placeholder or demo data as if real.
Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't use gradient text, decorative page-load choreography, or display fonts in UI labels, buttons, and data.
Don't treat modals as the first design answer; prefer inline review, progressive disclosure, sheets, or detail pages for admin workflows.
